label: Neuroscience & cognitive science

node.label: Neuroscience & cognitive science
node.definition: Neural coding, plasticity, memory, perception, and cognition provide biological inspiration and comparative models of intelligence.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Neuroscience & cognitive science is to connect Probability theory, Dynamical systems & control theory to downstream capabilities including Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity.
examples: substrate for Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Dynamical systems & control theory.

dependencies.rationale: Neuroscience & cognitive science rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Probability theory.
Neuroscience & cognitive science rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Dynamical systems & control theory.
Neuroscience & cognitive science rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Signal processing & harmonic analysis.

sentence_units.text: Neural coding, plasticity, memory, perception, and cognition provide biological inspiration and comparative models of intelligence.

The role of Neuroscience & cognitive science is to connect Probability theory, Dynamical systems & control theory to downstream capabilities including Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity.
